stanzas:
En Vizhiyin Kanavu Song Lyrics 
Bangalore Naatkal
Singer: Anna Katharina Valayil Chandy, Gopi Sunder
Lyrics: Madhan Karky

en vizhiyin kanavu
un sondham illai
nee kaanaadhe - adhil
pizhai thaedaadhe

en siriya ulagil
nee yaarm illai
Yaen ketkaadhe-adhil
adi vaikaadhe

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of longing and unfulfilled love, highlighting the emotional struggles of the protagonist.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Bangalore Naatkal, this song reflects the inner feelings of the characters as they navigate their relationships and dreams.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Anna Katharina Valayil Chandy and Gopi Sunder.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Karky.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 24, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Vizhiyin Kanavu, the characters in Bangalore Naatkal express their deep yearning for love and connection. The song's romantic and melancholic tones beautifully convey the emotions of longing and introspection. As the singers harmonize, listeners are taken on a journey through the complexities of relationships. This heartfelt melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Vizhiyin Kanavu from Bangalore Naatkal is a beautifully crafted duet that captures the essence of longing and romance. With the soulful voices of Anna Katharina Valayil Chandy and Gopi Sunder, this song resonates with anyone who has ever dreamed of love. The poignant lyrics by Karky add depth to the emotional journey, making it a must-listen for fans of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: In my dream, you are not there, so don't look for faults in it.
In my small world, there is no one like you. Why don't you ask? Don't put your foot in it.
I sing songs as myself. Am I thinking too much?
Should my hunger and thirst also come to you?
Again and again, you shower flowers on me.
In my eyes, your tears are making me feel something.
Your sorrow is entering my heart, why is that?
Why have you become like this? Even though I am myself.
I can't see you in me, you are me!!
You are so close. You come every day.
I have solved my heart's issues, but you have gone without saying anything.
Is my love not touching you? You are avoiding me without speaking!!
My love.. will you not see me? Will you not see me?
